pages.raw_text:
Arthur Hooker. of Spokane, ma.
tional and executive secretary OF
the Eighteenth National Irrigation
congress, and member of the ad.
visory committee of the National
Farm Land congress. will speak
upon Farm BODYBUILDING in the
Northwest" at the first convention
of the last named organization at
Chicago, opening November 16,
also attending the United States
Land and Irrigation congress at
Chicago, November 20 to Deem
Der 4.


Mr.. Hooker and Miss Mabel
Sarah Baker. daughter of Mr.. and
Mrs. Baker. will be married at the
home of the brides parents at
Pullman, Wash. on November 10,
soon after which they will start
on their wedding trip to Chicago
where they will pass several
weeks, afterward making their
home at Pueblo, where Mr.. Hook,
er will have his headquarters next
year, working directly with the To-
cal board of control and the ma.
tional officers.
